title: Browser Sonar
tagline: Chirp your speakers, catch the echo, and sketch your room in a tab.
holy_shit: A plain static page pings your room, computes echo distance with Python in-browser, and paints a live map while you rotate — no backend, no depth sensor.
powered_by: Web Audio chirps + in-browser CPython matched filtering (scipy.signal.correlate) + orientation-based canvas mapping
agent_scenario: When you need no-backend active sensing in the browser: emit a known pulse, correlate echoes in Python, and project ranges into a live spatial view.
author: kody-w + Copilot
